title: identity.rs uses rand::random() for HPKE seed instead of explicit OsRng
description: identity.rs:35 uses rand::random() for the HPKE seed while all other cryptographic randomness in the codebase explicitly uses OsRng. rand::random() is implemented via thread_rng() which is OS-seeded and cryptographically secure, but the implicit form obscures the entropy source. Replace with OsRng.fill_bytes(&mut hpke_seed) to match the explicit pattern used in auth.rs and hpke.rs and make the entropy source auditable at a glance.
